software.title: Software Development
software.text: Experienced in OOP and functional programming with Java, Python, JavaScript, and C++. Strong foundation in algorithms and problem-solving.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Development
fullstack.text: Building responsive web apps using React, Next.js, Node.js, and Express. Skilled in REST APIs, authentication, and real-time integrations.

database.title: Database Systems
database.text: Proficient in PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and SQL. Experience designing relational schemas, optimizing queries, and ensuring data integrity.

project1.title: Eco Life Etiqo'd
project1.description: Eco-Life Etiqod is a wellness resort website showcasing natural spring water, buffet dining, and a cozy family-friendly atmosphere. It features a responsive multi-page layout with modern design and smooth interactions. Built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React, the project delivers an engaging user experience across all devices.

project2.title: Mazzo Premium
project2.description: Mazzo Premium is an elegant e-commerce showcase featuring premium products, styled with refined visuals and intuitive navigation. Built using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React, the site delivers a seamless, responsive user experience.

footer.title: Available for freelance opportunities
footer.description: Have an exciting project you need help with? Send me an email or contact me via instant message!

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: I'd love to hear from you. Send me a message and I'll respond as soon as possible.

hero.title: About Me
hero.description: I design and build complete digital systems — from interfaces to backend architecture — focusing on performance, scalability, and clean interaction.

software.title: Software Engineering
software.description: Writing structured, maintainable code with focus on performance, scalability, and clean architecture. I specialize in Object-Oriented and Functional programming paradigms across Java, Python, JavaScript, and C++, with strong foundations in data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Development
fullstack.description: Building complete web applications — from responsive UI to backend services and APIs. I create seamless experiences using React and Next.js for frontends, paired with Node.js and Express backends, handling everything from state management to deployment.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Designing REST APIs, implementing complex business logic, and integrating third-party services. My backend expertise covers authentication systems, database optimization, error handling, and building scalable service architectures.

systems.title: System Design
systems.description: Structuring full systems with attention to data flow, architecture decisions, and modular design patterns. I focus on creating systems that scale efficiently while maintaining code clarity and separation of concerns.

applications.title: Application Development
applications.description: Creating functional applications with real-world use cases, integrating UI components, business logic, and user interaction flows into cohesive solutions that solve actual problems.

database.title: Data & Storage
database.description: Working with both relational and NoSQL databases, designing efficient schemas, optimizing queries, and managing data access patterns. Proficient in PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and SQL with experience in data integrity and performance tuning.

process.title: How I Work
process.step1_desc: Understanding the problem, requirements, and defining clear system structure before writing any code.
process.step2_desc: Planning architecture, UI/UX flow, and data models. Creating blueprints that guide development.
process.step3_desc: Implementing clean, scalable, and efficient code while maintaining best practices and documentation.
process.step4_desc: Optimizing performance, testing thoroughly, and improving user experience based on feedback.
